name: Turkey Strata
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine turkey, cheese, and olives; mix lightly.
2. Place half of the bread cubes in an 8x8-inch baking dish; top with turkey mixture and remaining bread cubes.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients except cheese; pour over bread.
4. Refrigerate overnight.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Top with remaining cheese.
7. Bake for 40 minutes or until set. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
